title: Namma Makkalu
subTitle: A couple from a middle-class family struggle to make ends meet and fulfil their children's dreams. However, tragedy befalls this family after their eldest son rebels against their modest lifestyle.

title: Rasarishi Kuvempu
subTitle: Kuvempu, born in a remote Karnataka village, evolves from a language professor into a renowned poet, driven by his passion for writing.

title: Filler
subTitle: Bringing the best in cinema.

title: Teleshopping
subTitle: Learn about a wide selection of products and take advantage of a convenient method of shopping. A show for those who love to shop from the comforts of their home.

title: Mruthyunjaya
subTitle: Trouble ensues when Chandru and Sundaru return to their native place and their envious, money-minded aunt tries to fix Sundaru's marriage with her daughter.

title: Sri Chamundeshwari Pooja Mahime
subTitle: A king neglects a sacred ritual to appease the goddess Chamundeshwari. Consequently, he endures the painful separation from his beloved wife and child as divine retribution.

title: Gowdru
subTitle: Ramegowda's unwavering love for his sister Gowri becomes a source of tension when her jealous husband schemes to disrupt their familial bond, leading to emotional struggles.

title: Kindari Jogi
subTitle: Kindari Jogi, a magical entity, goes to Hanumapura using Ravi's guise to help him with his sister's marriage. However, while he tries to unite two quarrelling factions, he falls in love with Ganga.

title: Swamy
subTitle: Swamy, a police officer, arrests Desai's son for illegal possession of weapons. However, owing to this incident, the duo lock horns and become enemies.

title: Kwatle Satisha
subTitle: Kwatle Satisha

title: Jugari
subTitle: Bringing the best in cinema.

title: Sidukabeda Singari
subTitle: Bringing the best in television.

title: Filler
subTitle: Bringing the best in cinema.

title: Nimma Adbutha Samaya
subTitle: Eminent religious leaders shed light on the power of the Almighty by reading verses from holy texts and guide people on the right path.

title: Time Bomb
subTitle: Bringing the best in cinema.

title: Dhairyam
subTitle: Ajay is a bright student from a lower middle class family. He falls in love with Parimala but her family's expectations push him into a financial crisis.

title: Hatavadi
subTitle: Balu, a passionate singer, is shattered when he is diagnosed with a brain tumour. However, he does not give up on his dreams and struggles to make a mark as a singer.

title: Kaviratna Kalidas
subTitle: After Kalidasa, a simpleton, gets blessed by Goddess Durga, he becomes a famous poet and forgets about his past life. Later, his friend, King Bhoja, helps him reunite with his wife, Vidyadhare.

title: Vishnu Sena
subTitle: After losing his family members to corruption, Professor Jayasimha vows to clean the system through violence. He forms a team with college students to punish people who engage in unfair practices.

title: Eno Onthara
subTitle: Surya and Madhumathi are college students in Mysore. Although they like each other, their egoistic nature stops them from confesssing their love.

title: Love
subTitle: Ganga initially believes Vikram to be a womanizer but changes her mind when he saves her in a fire accident. But after they start dating, the arrival of a mysterious woman changes their lives.

title: Central Rowdy
subTitle: A fearless young man takes on corruption and deceit, confronting two cunning women who exploit innocent people while striving to set things right in a world filled with injustice.

title: JH Ministry
subTitle: Bringing the best in television.

title: The Lord's Challenge
subTitle: Joshua Daniel of Laymen's Evangelical Fellowship reads biblical passages, explains their significance and encourages devotees to have a personal relationship with the Almighty.

title: Kamarottu Checkpost
subTitle: A group of visitors does not imagine encountering a whirlwind of paranormal activity when they decide to stay at a friend's house in a remote location.

title: Nammanna
subTitle: A tribal man become a dangerous Naxalite and constantly on the run from the police. However, things become complicated when a powerful gangster kills his brother.

title: Maasthi Gudi
subTitle: Maasthi uncovers an illegal poaching ring targeting tigers in a forest reserve and fights to protect the animals, putting his life at risk against powerful adversaries who will stop at nothing.

title: Kuberaa
subTitle: Following a tycoon's discovery of a rare oil reserve, a compassionate beggar gets trapped in the dangerous mechanisms of his rapacious scheme.

title: Chowka
subTitle: After being wrongfully accused of committing a crime, four friends unite to help their school teacher who is proven guilty of an offence he did not perpetrate.

title: Aata Hudugata
subTitle: Prema and Raj decide to help their friends, who are in love but face severe disapproval for their relationship. However, things get complicated when one of them is murdered.
